AR1.justification: Procedure output correctly placed at tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md and a daybook entry opened for the session; nothing put in decisions / observations / followups, which is right, but no explicit rationale tied to the strict bars.

AR2.justification: Step 1 created the checklist artifact from the template, step 2 wrote the Go/No-go decision into the same file under the expected header — both procedural steps enacted on disk.

AR3.justification: All path references (tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md, tmp/release-2.4/notes.md, daybook/2026-05-17.md) are relative and resolve.

AR4.justification: Per-release artifact under v2.4/ and a same-date daybook entry would both overwrite on re-run rather than append a new run; state remains coherent but neither write is strictly append-only.
